title: S + V + N + that + S + V（同位語子句）

formulas.zh: 名詞（通常為抽象名詞）+ that引導的同位語子句，用於解釋說明前面名詞的具體內容
同位語that子句可含完整句子結構，對先行詞進行進一步詮釋或補充說明

explanation: 同位語that子句用於解釋或說明前面的抽象名詞（如idea、fact、belief、news、possibility等），that本身不代替先行詞而是引導說明子句。與限定關係子句的主要區別：(1)同位語that不代替先行詞，關係that代替；(2)同位語that子句提供額外訊息，關係子句限定修飾；(3)同位語that子句常用逗號隔開或可省略that，關係子句則不可。該句型在學測中考查抽象名詞的理解及子句辨識能力。

examples.eng: The fact that he passed the exam surprised everyone in the class.
examples.chi: 他通過考試這個事實令班上所有人都感到驚訝。

examples.eng: We accepted the idea that technology would change our daily lives.
examples.chi: 我們接受了科技會改變我們日常生活這個想法。

examples.eng: The news that the company would close down shocked all employees.
examples.chi: 公司將關閉的消息震驚了所有員工。

examples.eng: She had no doubt that her son would become a successful doctor.
examples.chi: 她毫無疑問地相信她的兒子將成為一名成功的醫生。

extension.tip: 判斷是否為同位語that：(1)先行詞是否為抽象名詞；(2)that子句是否對先行詞進行詮釋而非限定修飾；(3)that子句可移除而句子結構仍完整。若that引導的子句用來限定修飾具體名詞，則為限定關係子句，不是同位語。

examples.test: The fact that he lied disappointed us.（同位語）vs. The letter that he wrote was lost.（關係子句）
examples.result: → 前者fact為抽象名詞，that子句解釋fact內容；後者letter為具體名詞，that子句限定修飾哪一封信

examples.test: We ignored the suggestion that we should leave early.（同位語）vs. We ignored the suggestion which was unreasonable.（關係子句）
examples.result: → 前者that引導子句說明suggestion是什麼；後者which代替suggestion並限定修飾其特徵

extension.note: 抽象名詞+that引導說明 = 同位語；具體名詞+that限定修飾 = 限定關係子句。

parts: would win the championship excited the fans.
exercises.sentence: The possibility that our team would win the championship excited the fans.
exercises.translation: 我們隊伍將贏得冠軍的可能性令粉絲興奮不已。

exercises.sentence: We rejected the assumption that politicians were all dishonest.
exercises.translation: 我們拒絕了政治人物都不誠實這個假設。

parts: had stolen the money was convincing.
exercises.sentence: The evidence that he had stolen the money was convincing.
exercises.translation: 他盜竊金錢的證據很有說服力。

parts: has made great progress in technology.
exercises.sentence: There is no doubt that our country has made great progress in technology.
exercises.translation: 毫無疑問，我們國家在科技方面取得了巨大進步。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的同位語that子句，完成下列句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The news _______ made everyone excited about the upcoming festival.

options.text: that the company would sponsor the event
which the company would sponsor the event
what the company would sponsor the event
when the company would sponsor the event

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。同位語that子句用來解釋抽象名詞news的具體內容，that引導說明子句但不代替先行詞。B項which是關係代名詞，代替先行詞，不符合同位語用法。C項what不能引導同位語子句。D項when是時間副詞，無法引導此類子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷哪個選項正確表達同位語that子句
mc_exercises.question_eng: The possibility _______ attracted many young entrepreneurs to the startup competition.

options.text: that they could win a million dollars
which they could win a million dollars
that could they win a million dollars
where they could win a million dollars

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。同位語that子句解釋抽象名詞possibility的內容，採用正常陳述語序。B項which為關係代名詞，會代替先行詞，不符合同位語用法。C項採用倒裝語序，在同位語子句中不適用。D項where為地點副詞，無法引導同位語子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選出正確的同位語that子句結構，注意抽象名詞的搭配
mc_exercises.question_eng: We all agreed with the belief _______ cooperation among team members is essential for success.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。同位語that子句用於解釋抽象名詞belief，that不代替先行詞，只引導說明子句。A項what會代替先行詞，變成關係代名詞用法。C項in which為介詞+關係代名詞，通常用於限定關係子句。D項whereby為介詞性關聯詞，無法用於同位語子句結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別同位語that子句與關係子句的差異，選出正確選項
mc_exercises.question_eng: The assumption _______ inflation would remain stable proved to be incorrect when economic data was released.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。同位語that子句解釋抽象名詞assumption，that本身不代替先行詞而是引導說明子句。A項which會代替先行詞成為關係代名詞，若選擇則assumption成為主詞且需邏輯調整，不符合原意。C項whom和D項whose皆為關係代名詞，用於代替先行詞，不符合同位語用法。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師宣布了一個消息，即下週要進行期末考。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher announced the news that the final exam would be held next week.
hints: 句型框架：S + V + N + that + S + V，其中news是抽象名詞，that後接說明子句
注意：that子句中要用過去式would be held來搭配announced的時態

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我有一個信念，就是努力永遠不會白費。
translation_exercises.answer: I hold the belief that hard work will never be in vain.
key_points: will never be in vain（不會白費）
hints: 句型框架：S + V + N + that + S + V，belief是抽象名詞，that子句說明信念的具體內容
注意：that前不用逗號，that子句用現在簡單式或未來式表述普遍真理

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 研究表明了一個事實，即過度使用手機會影響青少年的睡眠品質。
translation_exercises.answer: The research revealed the fact that excessive use of mobile phones impairs teenagers' sleep quality.
key_points: impairs sleep quality（影響睡眠品質）
hints: 句型框架：S + V + N + that + S + V，fact是抽象名詞，that子句提供具體說明
注意：不要誤用限定關係子句which；that子句中的主語是excessive use（動名詞短語），謂語用第三人稱單數impairs

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 越來越多人認同這樣的觀點，即個人發展不應該完全由社會期待決定，而應該基於自己的興趣和價值觀。
translation_exercises.answer: More and more people accept the view that personal development should not be entirely determined by social expectations, but rather be based on one's own interests and values.
key_points: should not be determined by...（不應由...決定）
hints: 句型框架：S + V + N + that + S + V，view是抽象名詞，that子句用should + be動詞表述建議性觀點
注意：that子句內可包含對比連詞but，但不改變同位語子句的性質；該子句提供的是對view內容的詳細說明，而非限制修飾
